sentence: Effective Date: January 28th, 2025
At VR Vision, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your personal information.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:1. Terms of Use
sentence: By accessing this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions of Use, as well as all applicable laws and regulations. If you disagree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site. The materials on this site are protected by copyright and trademark laws.

You are granted permission to temporarily download one copy of the materials (data or software) on VR Vision Inc’s website for personal, non-commercial use only. This is a license, not a transfer of title. Under this license, you may not: Modify or copy the materials.

You are granted permission to temporarily download one copy of the materials (data or software) on VR Vision Inc’s website for personal, non-commercial use only. This is a license, not a transfer of title. Under this license, you may not: Use the materials for any commercial purpose or public display.

You are granted permission to temporarily download one copy of the materials (data or software) on VR Vision Inc’s website for personal, non-commercial use only. This is a license, not a transfer of title. Under this license, you may not: Attempt to decompile or reverse engineer any software on VR Vision Inc’s website.

You are granted permission to temporarily download one copy of the materials (data or software) on VR Vision Inc’s website for personal, non-commercial use only. This is a license, not a transfer of title. Under this license, you may not: Remove any copyright or proprietary notices from the materials.

You are granted permission to temporarily download one copy of the materials (data or software) on VR Vision Inc’s website for personal, non-commercial use only. This is a license, not a transfer of title. Under this license, you may not: Transfer the materials to another person or “mirror” the materials on another server.

This license will terminate automatically if you violate any of these restrictions and may be terminated by VR Vision Inc at any time. Upon termination, you must destroy any downloaded materials in your possession, whether in electronic or printed form.

The materials on VR Vision Inc’s website are provided “as is.” VR Vision Inc makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and disclaims all warranties, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property rights.

In no event shall VR Vision Inc or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, but not limited to, loss of data or profits, or business interruption) arising from the use or inability to use the materials on VR Vision Inc’s website, even if VR Vision Inc has been notified of the possibility of such damages.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:5. Amendments and Errata
sentence: The materials on VR Vision Inc’s website may contain technical, typographical, or photographic errors. VR Vision Inc does not warrant that any of the materials on its site are accurate, complete, or current and may change them at any time without notice.

VR Vision Inc has not reviewed all of the sites linked to its website and is not responsible for their content. The inclusion of a link does not imply endorsement. Use of any linked site is at the user’s own risk.

section: H1:Privacy Policy > H2:7. Site Terms of Use Modifications
sentence: VR Vision Inc may update these Terms of Use at any time without notice. By using this site, you agree to be bound by the most current version of these Terms.
Any claim related to VR Vision Inc’s website shall be governed by the laws of Toronto, Canada, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
We will identify the purposes for collecting personal information before or at the time of collection.
We will collect and use personal data solely for fulfilling those purposes unless we obtain consent or are required by law.
We will retain personal data only as long as necessary for its intended use.
Personal data will be collected lawfully and fairly, with the knowledge or consent of the individual where appropriate.
Personal information should be relevant, accurate, complete, and up-to-date.
We will protect personal data against loss, theft, unauthorized access, disclosure, duplication, or alteration.
We will make our privacy policies and procedures available to customers upon request.
We are committed to conducting our business in accordance with these principles to ensure that the privacy of personal information is protected and maintained.
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us.
